summary: Completed a read-only Role 1 user-intent/completion-bar review of the unfinished DinoBrain OS improvement plan. Verdict: REVISE_REQUIRED. The candidate direction is right, but it must add stricter evidence requirements for direct MCP parity, native instruction authority, event-triggered behavior recall, retrieval answer-quality evaluation, and the 10-reviewer consensus record before Role 1 can agree.
decisions: Return REVISE_REQUIRED rather than AGREE because client_mcp_direct_status currently reports needs_recheck for both Codex and Claude with missing exact single-name direct MCP proof.
Require the unfinished-plan document to include a frozen evidence bundle, reviewer identity/lens table, dissent-resolution loop, and exact acceptance tests for P0-04, P0-05, P1-09, and P1-10.
Treat current user instruction and local evidence as higher authority than previous memory summaries.
next_steps: Draft or amend the completion-plan document with the exact Role 1 revisions before seeking consensus from all 10 reviewers.
Implement status:mcp-direct proof for Codex and Claude using exact single-name tool discovery and tool-call proof artifacts.
Add native instruction authority scanning/gating, event-triggered behavior recall evidence, and real answer-quality memory-on/off evaluation requirements.
